mica.question: Does {name} have a MiCA licence?
mica.bodyNotAuthorised: No. {name} is not listed in the EU's ESMA register of authorised crypto-asset service providers (CASPs). The MiCA transition period ended on 1 July 2026, so without a MiCA authorisation it may not be permitted to serve clients in the EU/EEA. Users in Europe should check the official ESMA register before trading.
mica.bodyAuthorised: Yes. {name}{entity} holds a MiCA crypto-asset service provider (CASP) authorisation — regulated by {regulator} in {country}, listed in the official ESMA register. Through MiCA passporting it may legally serve clients across the EU/EEA ({count} countries).
mica.bodySuccessorLead: Not any more. {note} The authorisation is registered to {entity}, which trades as {brand} — regulated by {regulator} in {country} and listed in the official ESMA register.
mica.passportSummary: Where you can use {name} · EU/EEA passporting ({count})
mica.passportBody: A MiCA authorisation passports across the whole EU/EEA, so {name} may legally serve clients in:

Custody.name: Custody & administration of crypto-assets

Trading platform.desc: Running a marketplace where clients can trade crypto-assets.

Crypto<->crypto.name: Exchange of crypto-assets for other crypto-assets

Order execution.desc: Executing buy/sell orders for crypto-assets for clients.

Placing.name: Placing of crypto-assets
Placing.desc: Marketing or placing crypto-assets on behalf of an issuer or offeror.

Order routing.name: Reception & transmission of orders
Order routing.desc: Receiving and passing on client orders for crypto-assets.

Portfolio mgmt.name: Portfolio management
Portfolio mgmt.desc: Managing crypto-asset portfolios on a discretionary basis.

Transfers.name: Transfer services for crypto-assets
Transfers.desc: Transferring crypto-assets on behalf of clients.

home.headline: Track how the world's <hl>neobanks</hl> are really doing.
home.lead: Ratings, reviews and sentiment for 100+ neobanks and crypto exchanges — aggregated from Trustpilot and the app stores, segmented by country, updated daily.
home.realReviews: Real reviews from Trustpilot, Google Play & the App Store
home.featChangeBody: Spot pricing, plan and positioning shifts across competitors before they reach you.
home.featSentimentBody: See whether the market mood is turning — positive vs negative, by country.
home.featMomentumBody: Follow how ratings and review volume grow across Trustpilot and the app stores.
